sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42997" key="e(stiatori/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑστιᾱτ-ορίς</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n42997.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Areca nut</tr_> (kernel of the palm <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Areca Catechu</tr_>), Plin <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">HN</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">24.165</biblScope> </bibl> (v.l.).</sense> </entryFree>
